---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for 1c-ai-workbench
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Be specific.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches have you considered? Why is the proposed one better?

## Use case

Describe a concrete workflow where this feature would help. Include example
input/output if possible.

## Scope

- [ ] Affects only one MCP server (which one?)
- [ ] Cross-cutting (affects multiple bridges or the core indexer)
- [ ] Requires live-1c-bridge (Phase B, separate major)
- [ ] UI-only (Tauri cockpit)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I would like to implement this myself with guidance
- [ ] I can test early versions
- [ ] I can write documentation
- [ ] I can only provide use cases and feedback
